title: Tirucalia giessii
intro: Tirucalia giessii, also known as the African bitter apple, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Tirucalia giessii include tirucallane alkaloids, as well as other compounds like tirucaline and giessenine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made with Tirucalia giessii include infusions, decoctions, and tonics, which are often used to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
